title: Near 52-Week High Positions
subtitle: Identify holdings trading within 2% of their peak prices

blocks.title: Proximity Summary

dataContract.description: Count and value of positions near high

blocks.sub_question: How many portfolio positions are currently within 2% of their 52-week high and what is the total market value of these specific positions?

blocks.title: Positions Near High

dataContract.description: Detailed list of positions within 2% of high

blocks.sub_question: Which portfolio positions are currently within 2% of their 52-week high, showing ticker, current price, 52-week high price, and percentage difference?

blocks.title: Closest to High

dataContract.description: Ranked list by proximity to 52-week high

blocks.sub_question: Rank the portfolio positions currently within 2% of their 52-week high by their percentage distance from the high, showing the closest first.

blocks.title: Distance Comparison

dataContract.description: Percentage distance from 52-week high

blocks.sub_question: What is the percentage distance from the 52-week high for each portfolio position currently within 2% of that high?

original_question: Which positions are within 2% of their 52-week high?

dataContract.description: Ranked distance from 52-week low

blocks.sub_question: What are the percentage distances from the 52-week low for positions within 2% of that low?
